title: BLUELIGHT RAT: YARA Keylogger Staging Files
description: Detects BLUELIGHT keylogger staging files (cheV01.dat, INTEG.RAW) and ESE database artifacts (edb.chk, edb.log, edbres*.jrs). The keylogger captures keystrokes with modifier prefixes and stages data for OneDrive exfiltration. Source: Volexity YARA rule APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight_B.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events') and ('Original Log Content' like '%cheV01.dat%' or 'Original Log Content' like '%INTEG.RAW%' or ('Original Log Content' like '%edb.chk%' and 'Original Log Content' like '%edbres00001.jrs%')) | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Process Name'
falsepositives: Windows Exchange/ESE database operations create edb.* files legitimately
The cheV01.dat file is unique to BLUELIGHT
